hooks.command: cd /Users/phanuphan/Downloads/Line-slip && CHANGED=$(git status --porcelain | grep -v '^??' | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && if [ "$CHANGED" -gt "0" ]; then git add -u && FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//') && git commit -m "auto: ${FILES}" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true && git push 2>/dev/null || true; fi
hooks.statusMessage: กำลัง commit และ push...
